chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD C.P. No.D-628 of 2026 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 1. For orders on M.A. No.2578/2026. 2. For orders on office objections. 3. For orders on M.A. No.2579/2026. 4. For orders on M.A. No.2580/2026. 5. For hearing of main case. 02.04.2026 Mr. Pervaiz Tariq Tagar, Advocate for the petitioner. == 1. Urgency granted. 2to5. The petitioner is aggrieved of an order of penalty imposed upon him after departmental proceedings. However, admittedly, an appeal against the said order of penalty is already pending before the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh. Therefore, this petition appears to be premature. Confronted with that, learned counsel for the petitioner does not press the petition so as to pursue the appeal before the Chief Secretary, Government of Sindh. Petition dismissed as not pressed. JUDGE JUDGE Muhammad Danish
